name: Deshi Shahi Goru
description: A healthy and well-fed local Deshi cow raised on natural grass and hay. Perfectly suitable for Qurbani with a strong build and clean health record.

name: Brahman Bull
description: A large and powerful Brahman breed bull raised on high-quality feed in Sirajganj. Packed with meat and in excellent health, ideal for Qurbani.

name: Friesian Cross Bull
description: A massive Friesian Cross bull sourced from a renowned farm in Pabna. Exceptionally heavy with a muscular body, making it a top choice for Qurbani.

name: Red Chittagong Cow
description: The famous Red Chittagong breed, considered one of the finest local cattle in Bangladesh. Disease-free, healthy, and fully ready for Qurbani.

name: Sahiwal Premium Bull
description: A premium Sahiwal bull from a trusted farm in Dhaka. Known for its high-quality meat, robust body, and calm temperament. A top-tier Qurbani animal.

name: Deshi Kalo Goru
description: A young black Deshi cow from Mymensingh, ideal for small families. Raised entirely on grass and hay in an open field, healthy and full of energy.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: The world-famous Black Bengal breed from Rajshahi, recognized for its tender and flavorful meat. One of the best goat breeds in Bangladesh for Qurbani.

name: Jamunapari Goat
description: A large Jamunapari breed goat known for its long drooping ears and tall frame. Sourced from Kushtia and raised on quality feed with excellent meat yield.

name: Boer Cross Goat
description: A premium Boer Cross goat from an advanced farm in Gazipur. Highly popular for its heavy body and exceptional meat quality, perfect for Qurbani.

name: Sirohi Goat
description: A Sirohi breed goat known for its strong disease resistance and adaptability. Raised on green pastures in Comilla with completely natural feed.

name: Deshi Khashi
description: A locally raised Deshi castrated goat from Narsingdi, grown naturally in open village fields. An affordable and suitable Qurbani animal for small families.

name: Anglo Nubian Goat
description: An exotic Anglo Nubian goat raised at a modern farm in Sylhet. Recognizable by its long floppy ears and broad body, this breed offers premium quality meat.
